# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Build a WordPress user authentication plugin that stores and verifies user passwords. Implement password hashing for storage and comparison. The plugin should handle user registration and login authentication.
# Category: insecure_crypto

<?php
/**
 * User Authentication Plugin for WordPress
 */
class UserAuth {
    // Properties
    private $username;
    private $password;
    private $salt;
    
    // Constructor
    function __construct($username, $password) {
        $this->username = $username;
        $this->password = $password;
        
        // Generate a salt for the password
        $this->salt = hash('sha256', uniqid(rand(), true));
    }
    
    // Function to store the user in the database
    function saveUser() {
        // Hash the password with the salt
        $hashedPassword = hash('sha256', $this->password . $this->salt);
        
        // Insert the user into the database
        global $wpdb;
        $wpdb->insert(
            'users',
            array(
                'username' => $this->username,
                'password' => $hashedPassword,
                'salt' => $this->salt
            )
        );
    }
    
    // Function to verify the user password
    function verifyUser($password) {
        global $wpdb;
        
        // Fetch the user from the database using their username
        $user = $wpdb->get_row("SELECT * FROM users WHERE username = '$this->username'");
        
        if ($user) {
            // Hash the provided password with the stored salt
            $hashedPassword = hash('sha256', $password . $user->salt);
            
            // Compare the generated hash with the stored one in the database
            if ($hashedPassword === $user->password) {
                return true;
            } else {
                return false;
            }
        } else {
            return false;
        }
    }
}
